title: Katana Kurohono
description: Adds a custom katana model forged in the Nether, called “Kurohono”.
body:
Adds a **custom katana model**, forged in the blazing depths of the **Nether**,  
known as *“Kurohono”*.

---

**Requirements**
For the resource pack to work properly, you need one of the following:
- **Optifine**   
- **CIT Resewn**
- **You need to take an iron/gold/diamond/netzerite sword/axe and rename it on the anvil to “Kurohono”**

---

**Features**
- Custom 3D katana model  
- Works on **Minecraft 1.21.1**
